name: shiftleft-qa
description: Shift-left test allocation と GitHub QA handoff を支援する Claude Code Plugin。

skills.name: capabilities
skills.description: shiftleft-qa の対応範囲、前提、非対応事項を案内する。

skills.name: analyze-pr
skills.description: Public flow 1/3: PR を解析し intent context・既存テスト・risk を一括取得する。

skills.name: design-handoff
skills.description: Public flow 2/3: analysis から QA handoff ドラフトを生成する。

skills.name: publish-handoff
skills.description: Public flow 3/3: QA handoff を GitHub Issue として publish / update する。

skills.name: setup
skills.description: Legacy / advanced: initialize config, workspace state, and progress tracking.

skills.name: pr-intake
skills.description: Legacy internal step: ingest PR or MR metadata and changed files.

skills.name: discover-context
skills.description: Legacy internal step: analyze code and diff context before exploration.

skills.name: map-tests
skills.description: Legacy internal step: map related automated tests and summarize coverage.

skills.name: assess-gaps
skills.description: Legacy internal step: identify coverage gaps and select exploratory heuristics.

skills.name: allocate
skills.description: Legacy internal step: allocate coverage gaps to testing destinations.

skills.name: handoff
skills.description: Legacy internal step: create QA handoff issue on GitHub.

skills.name: generate-charters
skills.description: Generate short, executable exploratory session charters.

skills.name: run-session
skills.description: Record exploratory session observations and evidence.

skills.name: triage-findings
skills.description: Classify findings into defects, spec gaps, and automation candidates.

skills.name: export-artifacts
skills.description: Export the brief, gap map, charters, and findings reports.
